message:
fix(test): prevent auto-increment collisions in write-heavy stress test

The stress_write_heavy_contention test had threads racing on SQLite
auto-increment IDs, causing sporadic UNIQUE constraint violations
unrelated to the concurrency behavior being tested. Fix by generating
deterministic unique IDs per thread (thread_id * 100000 + seq) and
using explicit INSERT with id column. Also add per-thread start/finish
logging and post-test row-count-per-thread diagnostics to make future
failures easier to root-cause.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
